subcodes.first_line: O thou distinguished offshoot of the sacred Lote-Tree! A while ago, the illustrious Afnans, upon both be the Glory of God, the Most Glorious, were summoned and they arrived in the Holy Land
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المکرم من السدره المبارکه چندی بود که حظرات افنان علیهم بهاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
